rationale: The citing paper uses Sethuraman, Tellis, and Briesch (2011) mainly as broad background evidence that TV advertising effects can be small or even non-positive, alongside other studies. It is also cited in a methodological aside as a review noting common distributed-lag assumptions. The citing study does not directly build its identification, hypotheses, or core model on this paper, and the citation serves a contextual benchmarking role rather than a distinct functional dependency.
